zh.West Bretton, Yorkshire, England: 英國越可爾韋斯特 布頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Matthew Wentworth於1467年出生在英國越可爾韋斯特 布頓時，他的父親Richard Wentworth27歲，母親Isabel FitzWilliam22歲。他於1493年與Elizabeth Woodruffe在英國越可爾伍利結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1505年11月12日在他的家鄉享年38歲，埋葬在英國越可爾希爾可斯同。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Matthew Wentworth于1467年出生在英国越可爾韋斯特 布頓时，他的父亲Richard Wentworth27岁，母亲Isabel FitzWilliam22岁。他于1493年与Elizabeth Woodruffe在英国越可爾伍利结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1505年11月12日在他的家乡享年38岁，埋葬在英国越可爾希爾可斯同。

nameMeanings.name: Wentworth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from Wentworth in Yorkshire. The placename probably derives from the Old English personal name Wintra + Old English worth ‘enclosure’.
habitational name from Wentworth in Cambridgeshire, which has the same etymology as the placename in 1 above.

nameMeanings.name: Matthew
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name of the Christian evangelist, author of the first gospel in the New Testament. His name is a form of the Hebrew name Mattathia, meaning ‘gift of God’, which is fairly common in the Old Testament, being rendered in the Authorized Version in a number of different forms: Mattan(i)ah, Mattatha(h), Mattithiah, Mattathias, and so on. In the Authorized Version, the evangelist is regularly referred to as Matthew, while the apostle chosen to replace Judas Iscariot is distinguished as Matthias . A related name from the same Hebrew roots, but reversed, is Jonathan . Throughout the English-speaking world Matthew has been particularly popular since the 1970s.

en.lifeSummary: When Matthew Wentworth was born in 1467, in West Bretton, Yorkshire, England, his father, Richard Wentworth, was 27 and his mother, Isabel FitzWilliam, was 22. He married Elizabeth Woodruffe in 1493, in Woolley, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 12 November 1505, in his hometown, at the age of 38, and was buried in Silkstone, Yorkshire, England.

fr.Bretton Hall, West Bretton, West Yorkshi: West Bretton, West Yorkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Matthew Wentworth est né en 1467, à West Bretton, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Richard Wentworth, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Isabel FitzWilliam, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Woodruffe en 1493, à Woolley, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 12 novembre 1505, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 38 ans, et a été enterré à Silkstone, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Matthew Wentworth 1467 in West Bretton, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard Wentworth 27 und seine Mutter Isabel FitzWilliam 22. Er hat 1493 in Woolley, Yorkshire, England Elizabeth Woodruffe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 12. November 1505 im Alter von 38 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Silkstone, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Matthew Wentworth è nato il nel 1467 nel West Bretton, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Richard Wentworth, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Isabel FitzWilliam, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Woodruffe nel 1493, nel Woolley, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 12 novembre 1505, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 38 anni, e fu sepolto a Silkstone, Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Matthew Wentworthが1467年にイギリスヨークシュアイアウエスト ブレットオンで生まれた時，父Richard Wentworthは27歳，母Isabel FitzWilliamは22歳であった。1493年にイギリスヨークシュアイアウリーでElizabeth Woodruffeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1505年11月12日に故郷で38歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアシルクストーンにて埋葬された。

ko.Bretton Hall, West Bretton, West Yorkshi: 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트 요르크실르 웨스트 브레턴
ko.lifeSummary: Matthew Wentworth(이)가 1467년 영국 요르크실르 웨스트 브레턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Wentworth(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel FitzWilliam(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1493년 영국 요르크실르 보리에서 Elizabeth Woodruffe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1505년 11월 12일 그의 고향에서 38세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 시크스톤에 묻혔다.

pt.Bretton Hall, West Bretton, West Yorkshi: West Bretton, West Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Matthew Wentworth nasceu em 1467, em West Bretton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard Wentworth, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Isabel FitzWilliam, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Woodruffe em 1493, em Woolley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 12 de novembro de 1505, em sua cidade natal, com 38 anos, e foi sepultado em Silkstone, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.Bretton Hall, West Bretton, West Yorkshi: вест бреттон, вест еркшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Matthew Wentworth родился в 1467 г. в местности вест бреттон, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard Wentworth было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel FitzWilliam, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Woodruffe в 1493 г. в местности вулли, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 5 дочерей. Он умер 12 ноября 1505 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 38 лет и был похоронен в местности силкстоун, еркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Matthew Wentworth nació en 1467, en West Bretton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard Wentworth, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Isabel FitzWilliam, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Woodruffe en 1493, en Woolley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 12 de noviembre de 1505, en su pueblo, a la edad de 38 años, y fue sepultado en Silkstone, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
